issues: Indentation errors in compute_signal and target_allocations methods cause logic blocks to be incorrectly structured.
In compute_signal, the rolling std dev is calculated on 'temp_max' which matches adapter output columns, correct.
Signal logic correctly implements the 20% spike trigger and exit conditions per spec intent.
In target_allocations, allocation is linearly scaled with spike magnitude as per spec, base allocation 5% used correctly.
Allocation is evenly distributed across entire universe including non-VIX ETFs (SPY, QQQ), but spec states to buy only VIX-related ETFs or options proxies (VXX, UVXY).
No filtering to restrict allocations only to VIX-related ETFs (VXX, UVXY) as required by entry logic in spec.
Signal names RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/HOLD are acceptable and treated correctly as BUY/SELL/HOLD.
Adapter import and usage of fetch_weather_series with expected columns is correct.
